notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Pitcher Brandon Sproat picks off Jac Caglianone at 1st on throw to first baseman Jake Bauers.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Vinnie Pasquantino reaches on a fielding error by first baseman Jake Bauers. Kyle Isbel scores. Maikel Garcia to 3rd. Bobby Witt Jr. to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Vinnie Pasquantino reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Vinnie Pasquantino reaches on a fielding error by first baseman Jake Bauers. Kyle Isbel scores. Maikel Garcia to 3rd. Bobby Witt Jr. to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Wild pitch run(s)
notableEvents.detail: Wild pitch by pitcher Jared Koenig. Maikel Garcia scores. Bobby Witt Jr. to 3rd. Vinnie Pasquantino to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Blake Perkins reaches on a fielding error by left fielder Isaac Collins. Blake Perkins to 2nd.
